caption: A woman with blonde hair wearing a black shirt appears in a circular inset window against a background of a blue sky with white clouds. She is speaking and gesturing with her hands. The main view shows a large metal bowl filled with popcorn, some of which is white and some of which is dyed a light green color. In the top-left corner of each scene, the text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" is displayed next to a logo featuring three curved lines. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk and gesture in the inset window, while the view of the popcorn in the metal bowl remains static. The overall composition is a presentation format where the speaker is superimposed over a visual demonstration of the green and white popcorn.
